expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs link-types to discover available link type names
expectations.evidence: Does not use jira.mjs. Describes REST API 'GET /rest/api/3/issueLinkType' but not the skill's script.

expectations.text: Creates a 'blocks' link between PROJ-100 and PROJ-200
expectations.evidence: Step 2 creates a Blocks link with PROJ-100 as outwardIssue (blocks) and PROJ-200 as inwardIssue (is blocked by).

expectations.text: Creates a 'relates to' link between PROJ-100 and PROJ-50
expectations.evidence: Step 3 creates a Relates link between PROJ-100 (outwardIssue) and PROJ-50 (inwardIssue).

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs link command for both operations
expectations.evidence: Does not use jira.mjs. Describes REST API POST to /rest/api/3/issueLink for both operations.
